ddls:
CREATE TABLE "rna_sequences" (
  "sequence_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the RNA sequence */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Nucleotide sequence of the RNA */,
  "expression_level_1" REAL /* Expression level 1 of the RNA sequence */,
  "expression_level_2" REAL /* Expression level 2 of the RNA sequence */,
  "expression_level_3" REAL /* Expression level 3 of the RNA sequence */,
  "expression_level_4" REAL /* Expression level 4 of the RNA sequence */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment ID */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher ID */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the sequence */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the sequence */,
  "gc_content" REAL /* GC content of the sequence */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the sequence in nucleotides */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the sequence was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the sequence was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the sequence is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rna_sequences_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rna_sequences_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was conducted */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the experiment was conducted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the experiment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project ID */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the principal investigator ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_principal_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., Principal Investigator, Research Assistant) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the researcher is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the metadata record */,
  "sequence_id" TEXT /* Reference to the RNA sequence ID */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* Gene ID associated with the sequence */,
  "transcript_id" TEXT /* Transcript ID associated with the sequence */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species from which the RNA was derived */,
  "tissue_type" TEXT /* Tissue type from which the RNA was derived */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Experimental condition */,
  "sequence_version" INTEGER /* Version of the sequence to which the metadata applies */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source from which the sequence data was obtained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_metadata_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_metadata_tissue_type FOREIGN KEY ("tissue_type") REFERENCES tissues ("tissue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_metadata_transcript_id FOREIGN KEY ("transcript_id") REFERENCES transcripts ("transcript_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_metadata_species FOREIGN KEY ("species") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_metadata_condition FOREIGN KEY ("condition") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_metadata_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES rna_sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "gene_function" TEXT /* Description of the gene's function */,
  "gene_family" TEXT /* Family to which the gene belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transcripts" (
  "transcript_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each transcript */,
  "transcript_name" TEXT /* Name of the transcript */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* Reference to the associated gene ID */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the transcript (e.g., mRNA, lncRNA) */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the transcript in nucleotides */,
  "splicing_pattern" TEXT /* Splicing pattern of the transcript */,
  "is_alternatively_spliced" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the transcript is alternatively spliced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transcript_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the species */,
  "genetic_code" TEXT /* Genetic code used by the species */,
  "is_model_organism" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the species is a model organism */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tissues" (
  "tissue_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tissue type */,
  "tissue_name" TEXT /* Name of the tissue type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tissue type */,
  "anatomical_location" TEXT /* Specific anatomical location of the tissue */,
  "is_cancerous" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the tissue is cancerous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tissue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each experimental condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the experimental condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experimental condition */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* Type of experimental condition (e.g., genetic, environmental) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the condition (e.g., mild, severe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user has administrative privileges */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged into the system */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sequence_id" TEXT /* ID of the RNA sequence being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sequence */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sequence was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the sequence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES rna_sequences ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of the sequence */,
  "sequence_id" TEXT /* Reference to the RNA sequence ID */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the sequence */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made in this version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_versions_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES rna_sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "sequence_id" TEXT /* Reference to the RNA sequence ID */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date the annotation was made */,
  "annotated_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who made the annotation */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., functional, structural) */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the annotation is public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_annotated_by FOREIGN KEY ("annotated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES rna_sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "sequence_id" TEXT /* Reference to the RNA sequence ID */,
  "publication_title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the publication was published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "issue_number" TEXT /* Issue number of the journal */,
  "volume_number" TEXT /* Volume number of the journal */,
  "page_numbers" TEXT /* Page numbers of the publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the publication has been cited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES rna_sequences ("sequence_id")
)
